---
title: "Regression"
author: "Sam Yu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}


```


```{r}
# define DV
intention_items <- dat_clean8 %>%
  select(paste0("action_intentions_", 1:15))

alpha_dv <- alpha(intention_items)

alpha_dv

omega_dv <- omega(intention_items)

omega_dv
```

```{r}
# DV quality check
# visualisation prepare
intention_long <- dat_clean8 %>%
  select(paste0("action_intentions_", 1:15)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "item",
    values_to = "score"
  )
```

```{r}
# histogram
ggplot(intention_long, aes(x = score)) +
  geom_bar() +
  facet_wrap(~ item, ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Intention Items",
    x = "Response",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# boxplot
ggplot(intention_long, aes(x = item, y = score)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Boxplot of Intention Items",
    x = "Item",
    y = "Score"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# zero order correlation 
# create intention composite score

dat_clean8$intention_composite <- rowMeans(intention_items)

# hope x intention composite
cor_hope_intention <- cor(
  hope_data,
  dat_clean8$intention_composite,
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)

cor_hope_intention

# hope x intention items
cor_matrix <- cor(
  hope_data,
  intention_items,
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)

cor_matrix

```

```{r}
# item level regression
# each item
model_h1 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_1, data = dat_clean8)
model_h2 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_2, data = dat_clean8)
model_h3 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_3, data = dat_clean8)
model_h4 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_4, data = dat_clean8)
model_h5 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_5, data = dat_clean8)
model_h6 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_6, data = dat_clean8)
model_h7 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_7, data = dat_clean8)

summary(model_h1)
summary(model_h2)
summary(model_h3)
summary(model_h4)
summary(model_h5)
summary(model_h6)
summary(model_h7)


# overall
model_all <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_3 + hope_4 + hope_5 + hope_6 + hope_7,
                data = dat_clean8)

summary(model_all)
```


```{r}
efa3 <- fa(hope_items, nfactors = 3, rotate = "oblimin", fm = "ml", scores = "regression")

# Generating factor scores into the original dataframe
hope_factor_scores <- as.data.frame(efa3$scores)

dat_clean8 <- dat_clean8 %>%
  bind_cols(hope_factor_scores)


# renaming hope factors 
dat_clean8 <- dat_clean8 %>%
  rename(
    Not_Hope = ML1,
    Goal_Hope = ML2,
    Action_Hope = ML3
  )
```

```{r}
# predicting action intention

model_hope3 <- lm(
  intention_composite ~ Not_Hope + Goal_Hope + Action_Hope,
  data = dat_clean8
)

summary(model_hope3)
```
